description:
You are a clinical research coordinator auditing VitalDB surgical recordings for data completeness. For the VitalDB Case #6 .vital file loaded in Vital Recorder, identify the track with the shortest total recording duration by reviewing all vital sign tracks. Create a report file at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\shortest_track_report.txt with the following format:

Case: 6
Shortest Track: [DEVICE/PARAMETER_NAME]
Duration (minutes): [NUMBER]
Total Case Duration (minutes): [NUMBER]
Coverage Percentage: [NUMBER]%

The track name must include both the device and parameter name (e.g., Solar8000/ART_MBP). Round durations to the nearest whole minute and the coverage percentage (Duration / Total Case Duration * 100) to the nearest integer.
